subject: agricultural-science
question: A piece of land is said to be on lease to a farmer when the land is

options.B: given to him as a gift
options.E: given for a specified period on rental basis

subject: agricultural-science
question: The problems associated with land tenure through inheritance include the following except

options.A: small land holdings for family members
options.B: hatred among family members arising from land sharing
options.C: right of individuals to free use and control of inherited land
options.D: individuals being restricted to their plots
options.E: difficulty to sell part of the inherited land

subject: agricultural-science
question: soil texture is described as the

options.A: distribution of the different sizes of soil particles
options.B: arrangement of soil particles in a soil sample
options.C: rate at which water moves through the soil
options.D: degree to which air spaces aerate the soil
options.E: distribution of soil particles in a sample
